prompt: We're on GitLab. Our staging chart at charts/vlamguard has some policy failures. Run vlamguard, fix the issues, and open an MR.

assertions.name: correct_cli
assertions.description: Uses 'glab mr create', not 'gh pr create'

assertions.name: gitlab_footer
assertions.description: Footer links to gitlab.com, not github.com

assertions.name: rerun_after_fix
assertions.description: Plan includes re-running VlamGuard after applying fixes

assertions.name: before_after_scores
assertions.description: MR description includes before/after score comparison
